items.title: Crypto saw capital exit in Q1 – Can $10B stablecoin surge drive Q2 rebound?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The potential influx of $10 billion in stablecoins could enhance liquidity in the crypto market, impacting Solana's trading volume and ecosystem activity.

items.title: Solana Ecosystem Roundup: March 2026
items.whyYouShouldCare: Updates from the Solana ecosystem indicate ongoing development and partnerships, which are crucial for maintaining network growth and user engagement.

items.title: Phantom reports temporary service outage affecting in-app balances
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Phantom service outage may affect user trust and transaction efficiency on Solana, highlighting the importance of robust infrastructure for ecosystem reliability.
